unit.name: Cashmere
unit.gameplay_identity: Mage calibration unit carrying Arcanist, Mogul through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.strongest_preserved_hook: one huge pale cracked arcane ledger
unit.dominant_prop_or_anatomy: one huge pale cracked arcane ledger
unit.supernatural_cost: paid kills erase memories and print them as tax-script through fingers and throat

psychology.core_wound: The first paid kill erased a beloved person's face from her memory, and profit made the intimate loss feel orderly.
psychology.private_want: She wants to own enough people, knowledge, and possible outcomes that nothing important can disappear beyond retrieval again.
psychology.primary_fear: An unpriced uncertainty will expose that she no longer knows what she sacrificed, whom she loved, or why any acquisition matters.
psychology.survival_strategy: Price, classify, contract, and own every danger before it can surprise or abandon her.
psychology.villainous_distortion: She treats people as assets and spends their lives, choices, and memories as expendable capital.
psychology.current_emotional_state: Pleasurable certainty while closing an acquisition she believes is already hers.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: Inviting proprietary warmth over concealed panic about the blank memory she cannot price.
psychology.face_direction: One eye sharply appraises the viewer while the other is fractionally unfocused; a tiny asymmetrical brow pinch and tight jaw betray fear beneath one inviting mouth corner.
psychology.pose_direction: The pale ledger crosses her center like a legal shield, held by a completely traceable arm, while the opposite ink-dark hand offers a precise contract-cast.
psychology.forbidden_read: No generic aristocratic smirk, neutral beauty model, friendly merchant, angry executive, sad sorceress, older woman, or merely pretty occult accountant.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Current feeling is visible as Pleasurable certainty while closing an acquisition she believes is already hers.
visible_face_evidence.want: The visible intent supports this private want: She wants to own enough people, knowledge, and possible outcomes that nothing important can disappear beyond retrieval again.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: The face visibly guards against this fear: An unpriced uncertainty will expose that she no longer knows what she sacrificed, whom she loved, or why any acquisition matters.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Face and posture enact this survival strategy: Price, classify, contract, and own every danger before it can surprise or abandon her.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The visible behavior expresses this distortion: She treats people as assets and spends their lives, choices, and memories as expendable capital.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Face cue: One eye sharply appraises the viewer while the other is fractionally unfocused; a tiny asymmetrical brow pinch and tight jaw betray fear beneath one inviting mouth corner. Pose cue: The pale ledger crosses her center like a legal shield, held by a completely traceable arm, while the opposite ink-dark hand offers a precise contract-cast.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The immutable Round 6 evidence compares cashmere directly with approved matte Vellum and all eleven calibration peers at master, face, and exact-96 scales.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for cashmere: She reads as a mature, lean, attractive acquisitive villain and combat-capable mage.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, cashmere meets or exceeds the professional floor for audience_and_intent_fit.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for cashmere: Paper, velvet, worn cloth, skin, ink, and metal maintain dry premium separation.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, cashmere meets or exceeds the professional floor for craft_and_finish.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for cashmere: The ledger-as-legal-shield leads; the raised black hand supplies the arcane channel.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, cashmere meets or exceeds the professional floor for coherence_and_hierarchy.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for cashmere: Ledger geometry, proprietary posture, asymmetric face, and narrow tailoring avoid roster duplication.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, cashmere meets or exceeds the professional floor for distinctiveness.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for cashmere: All required concept, psychology, face, 96px, and deterministic lineage evidence is supplied.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, cashmere meets or exceeds the professional floor for completeness_and_downstream_usability.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for cashmere: Ledger rectangle, narrow stance, split drape, and raised hand survive exact scale.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, cashmere meets or exceeds the professional floor for silhouette_and_96px_readability.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for cashmere: One appraising eye, one unfocused eye, pinched brow, and tight mouth show ownership over panic.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, cashmere meets or exceeds the professional floor for psychology_and_villain_read.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for cashmere: Mogul ownership dominates; Arcanist remains confined to script and the casting hand.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, cashmere meets or exceeds the professional floor for production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.

professional_standard.rejection_case: The strongest honest rejection case was tested against the native evidence, derivative lineage, anatomy, trait channels, and roster comparisons and did not survive cross-examination.
professional_standard.excellence_gap: Later production may further refine micro-material transitions, but no gap falls below the professional concept-art floor or weakens the locked identity.

cross_examination.outcome: All decisive claims survived the one permitted cross-examination; no unrefuted blocker remains.
